} TIMES. CONCATENATE gv_mem lv_chunk INTO gv_mem IN BYTE MODE. ENDDO.|
|FORM mem_ld_i32 USING iv_addr TYPE i CHANGING rv TYPE i.|
|DATA lv_b TYPE x LENGTH 4. lv_b = gv_mem+iv_addr(4). DATA(lv_r) = lv_b+3(1) && lv_b+2(1) && lv_b+1(1) && lv_b+0(1). rv = lv_r.|
|FORM mem_st_i32 USING iv_addr TYPE i iv_val TYPE i.|
|DATA lv_b TYPE x LENGTH 4. lv_b = iv_val. DATA(lv_r) = lv_b+3(1) && lv_b+2(1) && lv_b+1(1) && lv_b+0(1). gv_mem+iv_addr(4) = lv_r.|
|FORM mem_ld_i32_8u USING iv_addr TYPE i CHANGING rv TYPE i.|
|DATA lv_b TYPE x LENGTH 1. lv_b = gv_mem+iv_addr(1). rv = lv_b.|
|FORM mem_st_i32_8 USING iv_addr TYPE i iv_val TYPE i.|
|DATA lv_b TYPE x LENGTH 1. lv_b = iv_val. gv_mem+iv_addr(1) = lv_b.|
